summary: Tested Footer Management feature in Homepage Manager. All 8 features working correctly: Backend GET/POST /api/website-admin/footer-settings endpoints work, Admin UI shows Footer section in sidebar with Company Info (description, phone, email), Quick Links, Customer Service, Showrooms, Legal sections with live dark-themed preview, settings persist after save/reload, Customer footer on /shop displays dynamic content from saved settings.

GET /api/website-admin/footer-settings r.details: Returns {settings: {}} when no settings saved, returns saved data after POST

POST /api/website-admin/footer-settings.details: Saves all footer fields: description, phone, email, quickLinks, customerServiceLinks, showrooms, copyrightText, legalLinks

GET /api/website-admin/footer-settings r.details: Verified data persistence - saved values returned correctly on subsequent GET

Admin: Homepage Manager sidebar shows 'F.details: Footer section visible in sidebar with Layout icon, clickable to open editor

Admin: Footer section shows Company Info.details: All sections present with data-testid attributes: footer-description, footer-phone, footer-email, footer-quickLinks-editor, footer-customerServiceLinks-editor, footer-showrooms-editor, footer-copyright, footer-legalLinks-editor

Admin: Footer section has live dark-them.details: Dark preview (.bg-[#1a1a1a]) shows all sections: Quick Links, Customer Service, Our Showrooms, copyright with year

Admin: Saving footer settings persists c.details: Modified description to 'TEST SAVE:...' and phone to '01234 TEST123', saved, reloaded - values persisted

Customer: Footer on /shop displays dynam.details: Customer footer shows saved description, phone, Quick Links, Customer Service, Our Showrooms, copyright, legal links

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - footer settings stored in website_settings collection with _id='footer_settings'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer Management feature is fully implemented. Admin can edit footer via Homepage Manager > Footer section. Settings saved to /api/website-admin/footer-settings (POST) and retrieved via GET (public, no auth required). Customer footer at /shop fetches settings and displays dynamic content with fallback defaults if no settings saved. All sections editable: Company Info (description, phone, email), Quick Links, Customer Service, Showrooms, Copyright, Legal Links.
